message:
feat(demo_showcase): enhance app chrome with spacing and theming

Implements bd-2k35: multi-pane app chrome (header/sidebar/main/footer).

Header:
- Uses header_style() from theme module
- Adds right-aligned theme name indicator "[Dark]"
- strip_ansi_len() helper for proper spacing calculation

Sidebar:
- Uses spacing::SIDEBAR_WIDTH (14 chars)
- Uses sidebar_style() and sidebar_selected_style()

Footer:
- Uses footer_style() from theme

Layout:
- Uses spacing::HEADER_HEIGHT and FOOTER_HEIGHT
- content_dimensions() method for page use
- Help overlay uses modal_style() for emphasis

Tests added for config defaults, theme selection,
ANSI stripping, and content dimension calculations.

Unblocks: 12+ downstream tasks including all pages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
